# o2-scalpel-go

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Go via gopls

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-go --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `gopls` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .go

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_split_file` | Split a Go file along symbol boundaries |
| `scalpel_extract` | Extract selection into a function or variable |
| `scalpel_inline` | Inline a function at all call sites |
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_organize_imports` | Remove unused imports and sort import order |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply all auto-fixable diagnostics (source.fixAll) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
